warnings.message: Visible guidance suggests the direct `HasSubst.X'`/`coeff_subst'` proof shape, but the generated proof uses the avoided finite-composition helper.
warnings.generated_cue: as constant term 0. This gives a finite sum representation of the coefficient. -/ theorem fps_comp_coeff_eq_finset_sum (f g : K⟦X⟧) (hg : constantCoeff g = 0) (n : ℕ) : coeff n (PowerSeries.
warnings.recommendation: Prefer `have ha : HasSubst (X : K⟦X⟧) := HasSubst.X'`; `ext n`; `rw [coeff_subst' ha g n]`; `simp only [coeff_X_pow, smul_eq_mul]`; then `rw [finsum_eq_single _ n (fun d hd => by simp [hd.symm])]`; `simp`.
